name: Chocolate Cherry Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the crackers using a rolling pin between sheets of wax paper.
2. Combine the crushed crackers with sugar and butter; stir well to ensure an even distribution.
3. Press the mixture firmly into a 9-inch pie plate.
4. Bake at 350°F for 8 minutes, then allow it to cool before filling.
5. Prepare the pudding according to the package instructions for pie filling.
6. Chill for 30 minutes, spread the pudding evenly over the crust.
7. Spread Coolwhip carefully on top of the pudding layer.
8. Spoon cherry pie filling on top and chill for 2 hours before serving.
